name: yveltal
flavor_texts: When this legendary Pokémon’s wings and tail feathers spread wide and glow red, it absorbs the life force of living creatures.
When its life comes to an end, it absorbs the life energy of every living thing and turns into a cocoon once more.
text: Yveltal is the Destruction Pokémon. It is a dark and flying-type Pokémon. Abilities: dark-aura. Base stats — HP: 126, Attack: 131, Defense: 95, Sp. Atk: 131, Sp. Def: 98, Speed: 99. Evolution line: yveltal. Lore: When this legendary Pokémon’s wings and tail feathers spread wide and glow red, it absorbs the life force of living creatures. When its life comes to an end, it absorbs the life energy of every living thing and turns into a cocoon once more.
